#v.description: Dictionary is mapping of keys to values.
Record is a list of named values.
A Save specifies the variables where end user values are saved. Values may be modified prior to saving by using the << operator. This applies to SAIL components.
A document is any file that a user has stored on the system.  Typically this value will be provided from a Process Variable.
